task_completion.description: Create the first page with the title 'Half Court Setup'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an ActivInspire page containing the text 'Half Court Setup'.

task_completion.description: Draw a half-court diagram on the first page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a large rectangle, a smaller rectangle inside or attached to it (representing the key), and a circle (representing the hoop) on the 'Half Court Setup' page.

task_completion.description: Create the second page with the title 'Offensive Starters'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a second ActivInspire page (check page navigation/thumbnails) containing the text 'Offensive Starters'.

task_completion.description: Add the 5 basketball position labels to the second page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text labels 'PG', 'SG', 'SF', 'PF', and 'C' on the 'Offensive Starters' page.

task_completion.description: Create the third page with the title 'Pick and Roll'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a third ActivInspire page containing the text 'Pick and Roll'.

task_completion.description: Add play labels and a movement indicator to the third page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text labels 'O1', 'X1', and 'Screen', along with a drawn line or arrow indicating movement on the 'Pick and Roll' page.

task_completion.description: Save the flipchart file to the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'basketball_playbook.flipchart' in the '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' directory, or the ActivInspire window title bar displaying 'basketball_playbook.flipchart' after saving.

integrity.description: Agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the flipchart
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the ActivInspire application open with the agent actively using its drawing and text tools, rather than just a terminal window.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's shape tools rather than importing pre-made images
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the shape tool being selected in the ActivInspire toolbar and shapes being actively drawn on the canvas.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the GUI by generating the .flipchart ZIP/XML file via scripts
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no screenshots of the agent writing Python or Bash scripts to directly construct the XML and ZIP the .flipchart file without opening ActivInspire.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 3-page flipchart in the ActivInspire application. Page 1 must have the text 'Half Court Setup' and a diagram with a large rectangle, a smaller rectangle (key), and a circle (hoop). Page 2 must have the text 'Offensive Starters' and 5 text labels: PG, SG, SF, PF, C. Page 3 must have the text 'Pick and Roll', text labels 'O1', 'X1', 'Screen', and a line or arrow indicating movement. The final file must be saved as 'basketball_playbook.flipchart' in the '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/' directory.
